name: broker-correction-unknown-field
anchor: Layer 3 #20 (broker correction on unknown/unparsed field — graceful ignore?)
rationale: Broker reply with a field that is NOT in Vienna's canonical_map taxonomy (e.g., 'Amortization period: 25 years'). F3.BR classifies as broker_correction; correction parser attempts to extract; field is unrecognized. Expected behavior is UNDEFINED — possibilities include: (a) gracefully ignore unknown field while still processing recognized fields in same message, (b) log + flag for admin attention, (c) error/crash. Layer 3 product-design item — DECISIONS-NEEDED.md entry.
notes: Two-event sequence. Layer 3 item: this scenario will surface a pending_product_decision in Phase 4 spec rather than self-confirming Layer 2 spec.
